author: y4rr
content:
Pass 5.B.1 closed APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Pattern B (device-resident migration) applied to ALL 7 sites in transforms.rs:
- ExpTransform: forward=exp, inverse=log, ldj=x.clone()
- AffineTransform: forward=add(loc, mul(x,scale)), inverse=div(sub(y,loc), scale), ldj=full(shape, log|scale|)
- SigmoidTransform: forward=sigmoid, inverse=log(y/(1-y)) via clamp+log+sub, ldj=-softplus(-x)-softplus(x)
- TanhTransform: forward=tanh, inverse=0.5*log((1+y)/(1-y)), ldj=2*(ln2 - x - softplus(-2x))
- SoftplusTransform: forward=softplus, inverse=log(exp(y)-1), ldj=-softplus(-x)
- ComposeTransform: forward/inverse fold through children; ldj=sum via add
- TransformedDistribution::log_prob: walks transforms in reverse, sums ldj via add, returns sub(base_lp, sum_ldj)

All apply bodies wrapped in no_grad(|| ...) to preserve requires_grad=false leaf-tensor contract. AffineTransform fields unchanged (loc/scale: T preserved; no public-ctor break).

Production-region grep for data_vec/TensorStorage::cpu returns 0. 369/369 lib + 41 conformance tests pass; build + clippy -D warnings clean. Sabotage probe captured numerical panic ('got -1 expected 0.36787945' from dropped exp).

dirichlet.rs and multivariate_normal.rs deferred via filed follow-ups #1136 and #1137 (Pattern A — fail-fast via fallback.rs); blocked on GPU lgamma/digamma/cholesky kernels which don't exist in ferrotorch-core. Legitimate phasing per pre-flight.

Subagent honest disclosure: SoftplusTransform inverse uses log(exp(y)-1) device-resident form which is mathematically equivalent to the prior CPU body for y in tested range (≤5); for y > 20 the prior body short-circuited and the new chain returns log(exp(y)-1) ≈ y to within f32 precision. Existing tests don't probe y > 20.
